description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the hafiyyan94/androidsdk25gitlabci:newSet Docker image and runs a before_script to make gradlew executable. Define two stages: build and test. In the test stage add a unitTests job that executes ./gradlew testDebugUnitTestCoverage and stores the generated JaCoCo coverage reports from app/build/reports/jacoco/ as artifacts. No caching, services, or deployment are configured.
